mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (chapter_id, type, content, options, answer, analysis, difficulty) VALUES (#{chapterId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{options}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{difficulty})
